title: Watch TikToker Mackenzie Sol Turn sombr’s ‘Back to Friends’ Into a Sensual Ballad for ‘America’s Got Talent’
summary: The 25-year-old immediately scored Mel B's Golden Buzzer with the impressive performance.
body: When Mackenzie Sol was just 4 years old, he auditioned for judge Simon Cowell on The X Factor . More than 20 years later, the now-25-year-old TikTok star was back in front of Cowell to try out for America’s Got Talent . Related Who Won Every Season of ‘America’s Got Talent’? Isaac Atkins, Army Sergeant With a ‘Sexy Voice,’ Scores Golden Buzzer on ‘AGT’: Watch ‘America’s Got Talent’ Hopeful Has the Judges ‘Beggin” With His Take on the Måneskin Hit: Watch On Tuesday night’s (June 23) episode, Sol transformed sombr ‘s breakout hit “Back to Friends” into a sensual R&B ballad, slowing down the tempo and adding a series of creative vocal runs, putting all the attention on the song’s heartbreaking lyrics. “Back to Friends” was sombr’s first song to hit the Billboard Hot 100 back in April 2025, eventually peaking at No. 7 in January this year. Ahead of his performance, Sol was able to tell Cowell about their first encounter more than two decades ago. What he didn’t mention is that in the years since, he’s gone on to amass more than 12 million TikTok follower…
